text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a Bushi character with printed cost 2 or lower - ready that character.
name: Hayaken no Shiro

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a character and put it into this province faceup, if that character has the Cavalry trait, you may put it faceup into any province you control instead. Shuffle.
name: Breaking In

text: Action: During a conflict at a [element-water] province, choose a participating character - ready that character.
name: The Pursuit of Justice

text: Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict - that opponent discards 1 random card from their hand.
flavorText: "As long as the Taint clings to you, there is nowhere for you to hide."
name: Kuni Purifier

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) This character gets +1 glory for each faceup province you control.
name: Veteran of Toshi Ranbo

text: Keeper role only. Action: Choose a province - discard each card in that province.
flavorText: Without the vast reserves of wealth once boasted by the Crane Clan, if falls upon its servants to ensure the clan does not starve.
name: Crippling Taxes

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose another participating character with fewer attachments than this character - dishonor that character.
name: Stoic Rival

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, if this holding's province is unbroken - turn that province facedown.
name: Hidden Mountain Pass

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) During conflicts in which this character is participating, your opponent cannot trigger abilities on the attacked province.
name: Ikoma Tsanuri

text: Pride. Action: During a conflict, if the [element-fire] ring is in the unclaimed ring pool, lose 1 or more honor. Choose an equals number of participating characters - remove 1 fate from each of those characters.
name: Isawa Tsuke

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Action: Choose a character with the most fate among characters in play - honor that character.
name: Celebrated Renown

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) While you have 6 or fewer honor, this character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political].
name: Shadow Stalker

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Action: During a conflict, choose a Shinobi character you control - move that character to the conflict.
name: Open Window

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Reaction: After you pass during the dynasty phase - each opponent who has not yet passed discards 1 random card from their hand.
name: Ride at Dawn

text: No attachmants except Weapon. Rally. Forced Reaction: After this character loses a conflict - your opponent may move 1 fate from their fate pool to this character. If they do, they gain control of it. (Unlimited.)
name: Mercenary Company

text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.) Attached character gains: "Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict - your opponent discards 1 card from their hand. (Limit twice per round.)"
name: Sturdy Tetsubō

text: You can only play this card if you control at least 3 faceup provinces.
flavorText: "My lord, is it wise to bring such lowly rōnin into your service? Surely there is a Doji or Kakita pupil who would serve better than... her."
name: Local Daimyō's Retainer

text: Earth role only. While 2 or more of your non-stronghold provinces are facedown, attached character cannot be chosen as a target of an opponent's triggered abilities.
name: Asceticism

text: Fire Role only. Reaction: After a conflict is declared - the defending player sets their hand aside, facedown and out of play. If they do, they draw 5 cards. At the end of the conflict, that player discards their hand and adds the set-aside cards to their hand. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Under Siege

text: Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict, choose a card in a province - discard that card. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "I have made the appropriate offerings to keep my home safe. Have you?" - Rujo the rōnin
name: Kyofuki's Hammer

text: Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate, if you are less honorable than the player initiating those effects – cancel those effects.
flavorText: "Who could refuse an order from the most honorable Elemental Masters?" - Shosuro Hametsu
name: Forgery

text: Attached character gains the Cavalry trait. Action: If an opponent controls 3 or more faceup provinces, sacrifice this attachment - ready attached character.
flavorText: Together, they will one day see the world.
name: Steed of the Steppes
